name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient generation of depreciation schedules causes delayed reporting. We automate the generation of monthly depreciation schedules instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient generation of depreciation schedules leads to delayed reporting.
features: manual data entry for fixed assets
